monitor_t Struct Reference

Data Fields

struct monitor_t * next
 Next monitor in the list.
uintptr_t ref
 Object associated with this monitor.
thread_t * owner
 Owner thread, NULL if the monitor is unlocked.
size_t count
 Number of times the monitor was acquired.
native_cond_t * cond
 Condition variable associated with the monitor.

Detailed Description

Represents a Java monitor
